diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c50c033be8c96785c17fe8ef4d1b412bc84be9df
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    pre_prompt_block = text.split("\n## Prompt Text\n", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(pre_prompt_block, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in pre_prompt_block
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in pre_prompt_block
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c50c033be8c96785c17fe8ef4d1b412bc84be9df
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    pre_prompt_block = text.split("\n## Prompt Text\n", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(pre_prompt_block, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in pre_prompt_block
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in pre_prompt_block
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

exec
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from tools.codex.v1_record_validation import looks_like_v1_record, parse_field_line
text = Path('notes/005_define_execution_record_and_generate_next_prompt_queue__SUCCESS__20260415_202522.md').read_text()
pre = text.split('\\n## Prompt Text\\n',1)[0]
print('has_run_id', parse_field_line(pre,'run_id'))
print('has_exec', '## Execution Facts' in pre)
print('has_review', '## Review Facts' in pre)
print('looks', looks_like_v1_record(text))
PY" in /data/git/handson-ml3

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..c50c033be8c96785c17fe8ef4d1b412bc84be9df
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    pre_prompt_block = text.split("\n## Prompt Text\n", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(pre_prompt_block, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in pre_prompt_block
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in pre_prompt_block
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

 succeeded in 203ms:
has_run_id None
has_exec True
has_review True
looks True

codex
The false positive is from old notes quoting V1 section headers inside fenced prompt text. I’m shifting detection to the top-level preamble before the first code fence, which matches how real V1 records are laid out and keeps malformed top-level records visible.
apply patch
patch: completed

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

exec
/bin/bash -lc 'python -m py_compile tools/codex/run_prompt.py tools/codex/review_run.py tools/codex/check_queue_readiness.py tools/codex/list_review_backlog.py tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py' in /data/git/handson-ml3
exec
/bin/bash -lc 'python tools/codex/list_review_backlog.py' in /data/git/handson-ml3
exec
/bin/bash -lc 'python tools/codex/check_queue_readiness.py' in /data/git/handson-ml3
exec
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from tools.codex.v1_record_validation import parse_record_file
print(parse_record_file(Path('notes/011_build_v1_review_writeback_helper__20260415_235346.md')).run_id)
print(parse_record_file(Path('notes/018_architecture_vs_actual_sweep__20260416_005130.md')))
PY" in /data/git/handson-ml3

+++ b/tools/codex/check_queue_readiness.py
@@ -8,27 +8,12 @@
 from dataclasses import dataclass

+from v1_record_validation import V1Record, ValidationError, parse_record_file
+
 
 PROMPTS_DIR = "codex_prompts"
 NOTES_DIR = "notes"

 PROMPT_NAME_RE = re.compile(r"^(?P<prefix>\d+)_")

@@ -42,22 +27,10 @@

-
-
-@dataclass(frozen=True)
 class ReadinessResult:
     target: PromptEntry
     previous: PromptEntry | None
-    latest_record: RunRecord | None

     ready: bool
     reason: str
 
@@ -151,98 +124,17 @@

-def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:

-

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

exec
/bin/bash -lc 'tmpdir=/tmp/tmp.glHzKGyiIL
mkdir -p "$tmpdir/bin"
cat > "$tmpdir/bin/codex" <<'"'SH'
#"'!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
out=""
while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do
  case "$1" in
    --output-last-message)
      out="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    *)
      shift
      ;;
  esac
done
printf '"'stub final output\\n' > \""'$out"
printf '"'stub stderr\\n' >&2
SH
chmod +x \""'$tmpdir/bin/codex"
prompt_path="$tmpdir/021_validation_smoke_prompt.md"
cat > "$prompt_path" <<'"'MD'
# Validation smoke prompt

Return one line.
MD
PATH=\""'$tmpdir/bin:$PATH" python tools/codex/run_prompt.py "$prompt_path"
' in /data/git/handson-ml3

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

 succeeded in 306ms:
/data/git/handson-ml3/notes/021_validation_smoke_prompt__20260416_011323.md

exec
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from tools.codex.v1_record_validation import ValidationError, parse_record_file, validate_record_text

valid_path = Path('notes/011_build_v1_review_writeback_helper__20260415_235346.md')
legacy_path = Path('notes/018_architecture_vs_actual_sweep__20260416_005130.md')
new_path = Path('notes/021_validation_smoke_prompt__20260416_011323.md')

print('valid_run_id', parse_record_file(valid_path).run_id)
print('legacy_parse', parse_record_file(legacy_path))
print('new_run_id', parse_record_file(new_path).run_id)

bad_text = valid_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').replace('"'`UNREVIEWED`'"', '"'`BROKEN`'"', 1)
try:
    validate_record_text(bad_text, source='mutated-from-valid-record')
except ValidationError as exc:
    print('mutated_reject', str(exc))
else:
    print('mutated_reject', 'FAILED_TO_REJECT')
PY" in /data/git/handson-ml3

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

 succeeded in 215ms:
valid_run_id 011_build_v1_review_writeback_helper__20260415_235346
legacy_parse None
new_run_id 021_validation_smoke_prompt__20260416_011323
mutated_reject record has invalid review_status: mutated-from-valid-record

exec
/bin/bash -lc 'python tools/codex/review_run.py notes/021_validation_smoke_prompt__20260416_011323.md --review-status ACCEPTED --review-summary "Stubbed validator smoke test" --reviewed-by codex' in /data/git/handson-ml3

index c6eca9f62311a8daeaf744e2ceb8196ac317a597..6adae54ce7e9d486dd6bf907a524a044534cc69f
--- a/tools/codex/check_queue_readiness.py
+++ b/tools/codex/check_queue_readiness.py
@@ -8,27 +8,12 @@
 from dataclasses import dataclass
 from pathlib import Path

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)

diff --git a/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..119e638c415857d399ee4d9dac034232d64216c3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/codex/v1_record_validation.py
@@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import re
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES = {"EXECUTED", "EXECUTION_FAILED"}
+REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES = {"UNREVIEWED", "ACCEPTED", "REJECTED"}
+REQUIRED_SECTIONS = (
+    "## Execution Facts",
+    "## Review Facts",
+    "## Failure Analysis",
+    "## Resource / Cost Facts",
+    "## Prompt Text",
+    "## Codex Final Output",
+    "## Stderr",
+)
+REQUIRED_FIELDS = (
+    "run_id",
+    "prompt_file",
+    "prompt_stem",
+    "started_at_utc",
+    "execution_status",
+    "finished_at_utc",
+    "runner",
+    "return_code",
+    "retry_of_run_id",
+    "review_status",
+    "review_summary",
+    "reviewed_by",
+    "reviewed_at_utc",
+    "failure_type",
+    "failure_symptom",
+    "likely_cause",
+    "recommended_next_action",
+    "elapsed_seconds",
+    "final_output_char_count",
+    "stderr_char_count",
+)
+TIMESTAMP_RE = re.compile(r"^\d{8}_\d{6}$")
+
+
+class ValidationError(ValueError):
+    pass
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class V1Record:
+    path: Path | None
+    title: str
+    run_id: str
+    prompt_file: str
+    prompt_stem: str
+    started_at_utc: str
+    execution_status: str
+    finished_at_utc: str
+    runner: str
+    return_code: str
+    retry_of_run_id: str
+    review_status: str
+    review_summary: str
+    reviewed_by: str
+    reviewed_at_utc: str
+    failure_type: str
+    failure_symptom: str
+    likely_cause: str
+    recommended_next_action: str
+    elapsed_seconds: str
+    final_output_char_count: str
+    stderr_char_count: str
+    run_suffix: int
+
+
+def _source_label(source: Path | str | None) -> str:
+    if source is None:
+        return "<text>"
+    if isinstance(source, Path):
+        return source.as_posix()
+    return source
+
+
+def parse_field_line(text: str, field: str) -> str | None:
+    match = re.search(rf"(?m)^- {re.escape(field)}:\s*(.*)$", text)
+    if match is None:
+        return None
+
+    value = match.group(1).strip()
+    if len(value) >= 2 and value.startswith("`") and value.endswith("`"):
+        return value[1:-1]
+    return value
+
+
+def looks_like_v1_record(text: str) -> bool:
+    preamble = text.split("```", 1)[0]
+    has_run_id = parse_field_line(preamble, "run_id") is not None
+    has_execution_section = "## Execution Facts" in preamble
+    has_review_section = "## Review Facts" in preamble
+    return has_run_id or (has_execution_section and has_review_section)
+
+
+def parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem: str, started_at_utc: str, run_id: str) -> int:
+    base_run_id = f"{prompt_stem}__{started_at_utc}"
+    if run_id == base_run_id:
+        return 1
+
+    match = re.fullmatch(rf"{re.escape(base_run_id)}__(\d+)", run_id)
+    if match is None:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id does not match V1 identity pattern: {run_id}")
+
+    suffix = int(match.group(1))
+    if suffix < 2:
+        raise ValidationError(f"run_id suffix must be >= 2 when present: {run_id}")
+    return suffix
+
+
+def validate_record_text(text: str, *, source: Path | str | None = None) -> V1Record:
+    label = _source_label(source)
+    if not text.startswith("# "):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record does not start with a markdown title: {label}")
+
+    positions: list[int] = []
+    for section in REQUIRED_SECTIONS:
+        pos = text.find(section)
+        if pos == -1:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing section: {section} ({label})")
+        positions.append(pos)
+    if positions != sorted(positions):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record sections are out of the expected V1 order: {label}")
+
+    values: dict[str, str] = {}
+    for field in REQUIRED_FIELDS:
+        value = parse_field_line(text, field)
+        if value is None:
+            raise ValidationError(f"record is missing field line: {field} ({label})")
+        values[field] = value
+
+    title = text.splitlines()[0][2:].strip()
+    run_id = values["run_id"]
+    prompt_file = values["prompt_file"]
+    prompt_stem = values["prompt_stem"]
+    started_at_utc = values["started_at_utc"]
+    execution_status = values["execution_status"]
+    review_status = values["review_status"]
+
+    if title != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record title/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+    if not TIMESTAMP_RE.fullmatch(started_at_utc):
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid started_at_utc timestamp: {label}")
+    if execution_status not in EXECUTION_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid execution_status: {label}")
+    if review_status not in REVIEW_STATUS_VALUES:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record has invalid review_status: {label}")
+
+    if Path(prompt_file).stem != prompt_stem:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record prompt_file/prompt_stem mismatch: {label}")
+
+    run_suffix = parse_run_suffix(prompt_stem, started_at_utc, run_id)
+
+    if isinstance(source, Path) and source.suffix == ".md" and source.stem != run_id:
+        raise ValidationError(f"record filename/run_id mismatch: {label}")
+
+    return V1Record(
+        path=source if isinstance(source, Path) else None,
+        title=title,
+        run_id=run_id,
+        prompt_file=prompt_file,
+        prompt_stem=prompt_stem,
+        started_at_utc=started_at_utc,
+        execution_status=execution_status,
+        finished_at_utc=values["finished_at_utc"],
+        runner=values["runner"],
+        return_code=values["return_code"],
+        retry_of_run_id=values["retry_of_run_id"],
+        review_status=review_status,
+        review_summary=values["review_summary"],
+        reviewed_by=values["reviewed_by"],
+        reviewed_at_utc=values["reviewed_at_utc"],
+        failure_type=values["failure_type"],
+        failure_symptom=values["failure_symptom"],
+        likely_cause=values["likely_cause"],
+        recommended_next_action=values["recommended_next_action"],
+        elapsed_seconds=values["elapsed_seconds"],
+        final_output_char_count=values["final_output_char_count"],
+        stderr_char_count=values["stderr_char_count"],
+        run_suffix=run_suffix,
+    )
+
+
+def parse_record_file(path: Path) -> V1Record | None:
+    text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    if not looks_like_v1_record(text):
+        return None
+    return validate_record_text(text, source=path)
